from __future__ import annotations

import locale
from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo


def python_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_locale_timezone_loaded_per_request_positive(timestamps):
    rendered = []
    for ts in timestamps:
        _ = locale.getlocale()
        zone = ZoneInfo("UTC")
        rendered.append(ts.astimezone(zone).isoformat())
    return rendered
